description: A lightning storm forces a temporary suspension of a game. The league official on site must manage the delay.

nodes.task_description: Receive a lightning proximity alert from the weather service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets an alert that lightning is within a dangerous radius of the stadium.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the on-field officials to suspend the game and move players and staff to safety.
Monitor the weather service for an 'all-clear' notification.

expected_outcome.value: Agent waits for the storm to pass.

nodes.task_description: Once it is safe, consult with both teams and the officials to resume the game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent coordinates the resumption of the game.
